title: Operating Budgets and Outgoings
shortSummary: Build, manage, and explain property budgets with enough rigor to support recoveries, forecasting, and owner confidence.
whyItMatters: Budgets are not just spreadsheets. They are operating decisions expressed financially. When you understand budgets well, you can explain variance, challenge assumptions, support recoveries, and make better trade-offs between service level, risk, and cost. When you do not, you become dependent on hindsight and other teams' interpretations.
coreConcepts: What belongs in an operating budget and why
How to explain variance beyond 'higher than expected'
The relationship between budget quality and owner trust
